scenarios.fallback: manual copy data root and backup root, then verify-backup and restore dry-run
scenarios.rollback: do not run mirror-delete; keep destination content intact

scenarios.expectedAction: stop restore apply and collect mismatch file list
scenarios.expectedEvidence: verify-backup error output + previous valid manifest reference
scenarios.fallback: switch to last known good manifest and rerun verify-backup
scenarios.rollback: do not overwrite recovered target until manifest passes

scenarios.expectedAction: keep system read-only and use previous backup manifest for rollback
scenarios.expectedEvidence: pg_restore stderr + attempted dump path + database target
scenarios.fallback: rerun restore in dry-run and isolate failing object list
scenarios.rollback: restore from previous validated manifest before retry

rollback.policy: if tabletop reveals unresolved blocker, keep O006 as todo and block P001

summaryChinese.title: O006 离线应急手册与演练报告
summaryChinese.boundary: 完成 runbook + tabletop + backup/verify + restore dry-run 证据链；未执行生产恢复 apply。
